commit_scope: Heal the kernel-router canary overlay after Docker kept canonical and hash-prefixed kernel-router container names reserved during fallback recreate. The deploy script now waits for those names to release before recreating the kernel-router and kernel-router-bml-front-door services.

local_validation.notes: Hostinger Auto Deploy run 27971485029 passed the API/web/pulse recreate guard and field-doc sync, then failed inside ensure_kernel_router_canary when Docker reported canonical and hash-prefixed container name conflicts for kernel-router and kernel-router-bml-front-door during fallback recreate.

ci_validation.notes: CI will run after the branch is pushed and the PR opens.

deploy_validation.notes: A new Hostinger deploy must pass after merge, then public native probes must confirm the BML runtime attention route and kernel-status route are stable.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passed; PR checks, Hostinger deploy, and repeated public probes remain pending.

evidence_refs: Hostinger Auto Deploy run 27971485029 failed in ensure_kernel_router_canary after the base service recreate and field-doc sync completed.

The failed log showed conflicts for /coherence-network-kernel-router-bml-front-door-1, /801076bfffdf_coherence-network-kernel-router-bml-front-door-1, and /coherence-network-kernel-router-1 during the kernel canary fallback path.
The base API/web/pulse path already used a bounded wait for Docker recreate orphan release; this commit applies the same principle to the kernel-router overlay and canonical service names.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Kernel-router canary fallback should wait for Docker to release canonical and hash-prefixed service names before recreating the kernel-router services, allowing Hostinger roll-forward to complete instead of wedging on name conflicts.
test_flows: deploy script shell syntax validates locally.
Hostinger static deploy path check still passes.
post-merge Hostinger deploy passes and public native probes remain stable.
